description: Ground-truth eval set for retrieval@k. Each item lists the source document(s) that genuinely contain the answer. A retrieval is a 'hit' at k if any gold document appears among the top-k retrieved chunks.

items.question: What percentage subsidy do small and marginal farmers get under the central Per Drop More Crop scheme?
What is the effective subsidy for small farmers in Maharashtra after the state top-up?
What is the maximum command area per beneficiary allowed in Gujarat?
What is Gujarat's micro-irrigation adoption index in the NABARD study?
What is the most common cause of drip system failure?
What is the standard end-to-end timeline from installation to subsidy credit?
items.gold_answer: Should not exceed 35 days; cases beyond 45 days are auto-flagged.

items.question: How is subsidy paid to the farmer under the Gujarat GGRC model?
items.gold_answer: Supplier-credit model: subsidy is paid to the empanelled supplier, farmer pays only the balance.

items.question: How much can drip irrigation reduce water use for horticulture crops compared to flood irrigation?
What is the three-tier grievance redressal structure for micro-irrigation subsidy?
items.gold_answer: Tier 1 Taluka Officer, Tier 2 District Superintending Officer, Tier 3 State Nodal Officer.

items.question: What is the cooling-off period before a farmer can claim drip subsidy again for the same land in Gujarat?
items.gold_answer: Once every five years for drip systems.
